text: SFO Terminal 2 is a domestic terminal pickup area (Alaska, Delta, and other domestic carriers). In this demo, the customer's original pickup is SFO Terminal 2.
SFO Terminal 3 is close to Terminal 2 and hosts United domestic flights. A Terminal 2 to Terminal 3 pickup correction is a minor airport reroute.
Drivers should not answer phone calls while driving. The agent may handle simple destination corrections and notify the driver.
For minor pickup corrections at the same venue, confirm the new destination with the caller, update the driver route, and send a short driver notification.
The demo customer is at SFO and may confuse Terminal 2 and Terminal 3. Prefer concise confirmation before rerouting.
